summary: Remove the DFM saved-name index file and dropdown lookup behavior.
details: DFM no longer creates or reads `dfm_method_names.json` or the browser-local cached DFM Name key; method lookup now uses the current Details fields and the standard local DFM JSON path only.
The Details Name field is now a plain text input without the saved-name dropdown/delete controls, avoiding conflicts where indexed lengths could override manual Origin or Development Length changes.
